caption: A man in a grey blazer and brown trousers stands behind a wooden podium on a stage, while another man in a dark suit and blue tie sits in a grey chair nearby. Behind them is a white wall featuring repeated logos and the text "INSTITUTE OF PEACE". To the left, a blue flag with a white emblem is visible. A small grey table sits between the two men. In the foreground, a large audience is seated, though only their heads and shoulders are visible. As the scene progresses, the man at the podium shifts his stance and gestures with his hands. The seated man remains relatively still, though he adjusts his posture slightly and looks toward the speaker. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, and the camera angle is a static wide shot capturing the entire stage and the front of the audience.
